CustomField.description:
The title displayed at the top of the quick action popup.
Note: Even though this is repeated on every field record for the same action, the LWC just grabs it from the first row.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The title displayed at the top of the quick action popup.
Note: Even though this is repeated on every field record for the same action, the LWC just grabs it from the first row.
CustomField.label: Form Title
